## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Upload '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Error Output
If applicable, paste the error or add screenshots.

## Contract Sample
If the bug is analysis-related, paste a minimal reproducible contract (remove any sensitive code):
```cpp
// Minimal contract that triggers the bug
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.x]
- LLM Provider: [e.g. Groq / None]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 125]
